title: Missingno
description: A silly little mod to change the game's black and purple "missing texture" texture
body:
# Missingno

A silly little mod to change the game's black and purple "missing texture" texture

This mod requires MidnightLib.

Make sure to provide a proper .png file, and preferably keep the dimensions a multiple of 16 in order to keep mipmaps from breaking.

This mod applies the texture on startup, so to apply changes you must restart the game.

If your custom image doesn't show up, you might've done something wrong, e.g. have a "fake" png file, so try re-converting your image into a png.
